name: Partner Network Ontology
description: Foundation ontology for partner, agency, and affiliate relationships within the PF-Core platform ecosystem. 6 owned entities: Partner, Agency, Affiliate, Referral, CommissionRule, PartnerPayout. Multi-tier attribution (platform + marketplace referrals), agency management of multiple client pies, tiered partner programme (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum), automated commission payouts via FairSlice revenue waterfall. 5 cross-ontology bridges to ORG, FAIRSLICE, GRC-FW, EMC, VSOM. Triple-Loop Outer Ring. Epic 50 F50.2.

components.Partner: Channel partner entity — Agency, Affiliate, Reseller, Consultant, Integrator. Tiered programme with KYC governance.
components.Agency: Specialisation of Partner — manages multiple client pies, earns management fee from revenue waterfall
components.Affiliate: Specialisation of Partner — refers new users/startups, earns % of platform fee with attribution window
components.Referral: Tracked attribution linking partner to pie — immutable referral codes prevent commission hijacking
components.CommissionRule: Defines how partner earns commission — rate, trigger event, conditions, cap
components.PartnerPayout: Aggregated payout to partner — period-based, KYC-gated, multi-payment-method

crossOntology.name: partnerIsOrganization
crossOntology.purpose: Partners are organisations with legal entity identity

crossOntology.name: referralLinkedToPie
crossOntology.purpose: Referrals attach to FairSlice pies for attribution

crossOntology.name: commissionViaWaterfall
crossOntology.purpose: Commission rules execute through FairSlice waterfall

crossOntology.name: partnerGovernedByGRC
crossOntology.purpose: Partner governance — KYC, AML, contract compliance

versionHistory.changes: Initial release: 6 entities, 10 relationships (5 internal + 5 cross-ontology), 7 business rules, 5 enumerations, 5 join patterns. Multi-tier attribution. Agency management portal. Tiered partner programme. Automated commission payouts. VP-RRR alignment: Problem=Risk (partner under-compensation), Solution=Requirement (automated attribution), Benefit=Result (channel velocity). Epic 50 F50.2.

notes: PARTNER-ONT completes the Foundation series by adding channel partner entities alongside ORG, ORG-CONTEXT, ORG-MAT, CTX, and GA ontologies. Closes the PARTNER-ONT gap identified in Epic 34 Graph Series Ontology Mapping (PFC-G-Foundation). Partners are organisations (extends org:Organization) with channel-specific properties. Commissions flow through the FairSlice revenue waterfall.

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Partner Commission to Waterfall Distribution Bridge
